displayNameZh: 不需要建 3D 模型，固定动画就够了
summary: Yt No 3d Needed component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「不需要建 3D 模型，固定动画就够了」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-no-3d-needed/src/YtNo3dNeeded.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtNo3dNeeded` and `ytNo3dNeededDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt No 3d Needed Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-no-3d-needed to my project. Preserve the exported YtNo3dNeededProps API and register the YtNo3dNeeded composition with the default props.
